title: myosotis arvensis var. simplex
intro: Myosotis arvensis var. simplex, also known as field forget-me-not, is a variety of the forget-me-not plant, which belongs to the borage family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Myosotis arvensis var. simplex include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
